rule.name: Springboot Actuator/Management Overexposure
rule.vuln_desc: Overexposed management endpoints can leak operational and sensitive data.
rule.developer: Limit exposed endpoints and enforce auth/network restrictions.
rule.reviewer: Verify actuator/management endpoints are hardened in production. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Springboot SQL Query Concatenation Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects dynamic SQL/HQL query concatenation patterns.
rule.vuln_desc: Concatenated queries may be vulnerable to SQL injection.
rule.reviewer: Inspect tainted data flow into query construction APIs. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Springboot Permissive CORS
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard CORS in controller/global config.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard CORS can expose endpoints to untrusted web origins.
rule.reviewer: Validate CORS settings across all controllers and profiles. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Springboot Insecure Transport Setting
rule.rule_desc: Detects insecure transport usage/settings in code or config.
rule.vuln_desc: Insecure transport can expose credentials and session data.
rule.developer: Enforce TLS and secure transport defaults.
rule.reviewer: Review transport settings for production hardening. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Springboot Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded credentials can be extracted and abused.
rule.developer: Use secret managers or runtime environment variables.
rule.reviewer: Verify credentials are not stored in source/config. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
